rulings.Case Title: CALIFORNIA DRY CLEANING TECH, INC. VS. BONG K. LIM et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Motion For Reconsideration Of The Court'S January 11, 2011 Order And To Strike The Same Based Upon Lack Of Jurisdiction
rulings.Rulings: Granted. The January 11, 2011 order is vacated without prejudice to the Plaintiff bringing a new motion asserting that Jakie Lim is an alter ego or alias of Bong K. Lim based on the additional evidence offered for the first time in response to this motion to reconsider. That renewed motion would allow Jakie Lim an opportunity to respond to that evidence and would allow the Court to make a decision based on a fully contested set of papers. If any party wishes to argue the motion, you must advise opposing counsel and the court (415-551-3702) before 5:00 p.m. on Wednesday, 12/7/11.

rulings.Case Title: IN RE: PHILLIPS, SPALLAS &.ANGSTADT LLP. AS SUCCESSOR et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Notice Of Motion For Reconsideration Of The Court'S 9/11/11 Order
rulings.Rulings: Denied. Arguments in the reply brief were properly responsive to new information in Respondent¿s opposition. In any event, Respondent did not object to the Court considering the arguments at the time or request a continuance or further briefing. Moreover, even accepting as correct the information Respondent now offers, which is the third version of the facts sponsored by Respondent, would not change the Court¿s conclusion since, however denominated, the monthly or bi-monthly draws of the shareholders are dependent on the firm¿s income and cashflow. If any party wishes to argue the motion, you must advise opposing counsel and the court (415-551-3702) before 5:00 p.m. on Wednesday, 12/7/11.
